scripts.patch: git add . && git commit -m "Patch version app" && npm version patch && pnpm --filter ./apps/* run patch
scripts.minor: git add . && git commit -m "Minor version app" && npm version minor && pnpm --filter ./apps/* run minor
scripts.major: git add . && git commit -m "Major version app" && npm version major && pnpm --filter ./apps/* run major
